conditions.description: Participation is limited to legal entities established in EU Member States, Iceland, Norway, and the following associated countries: Canada, Israel, Republic of Korea, New Zealand, Switzerland, and the United Kingdom.
Entities controlled by non-eligible countries may be excluded from participation unless sufficient guarantees are provided.
Activities are expected to start at Technology Readiness Level (TRL) 2 and achieve TRL 5 by the end of the project.
The maximum EU contribution per project is EUR 19,000,000. The indicative total topic budget is EUR 38,000,000 for up to 2 projects.
Submission follows a single-stage procedure with a deadline of 15 April 2026.

The standard minimum consortium composition requirement for Horizon Europe RIA actions applies: at least 3 independent legal entities from at least 3 different eligible countries. This condition is not explicitly stated in the topic source documents.
conditions.assumption_note: Standard Horizon Europe RIA eligibility requires at least 3 independent legal entities from at least 3 different eligible countries, per the General Annexes. The topic source documents (slice.json and curated extract) contain empty eligibility_conditions fields and do not explicitly state consortium size requirements. This condition is assumed from the RIA instrument type as recorded in selected_call.json. Verification required against Tier 1 General Annexes.
